overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk night market with neon lighting, food stalls, and scattered pedestrians. The scene features a mix of covered walkways and open seating areas with palm trees and digital advertisements, clearly from Cyberpunk 2077.

approaching food stall area with merchandise displays

colorful market umbrella shading a food cart

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered cyberpunk market walkway at night, dominated by a central palm tree and neon signage. The camera moves forward as a woman pedestrian passes by on the right, approaching colorful food stalls with umbrellas.

scene_state.functional_zone: food court seating area with plastic chairs and merchandise displays

entering the main food service counter area with illuminated displays

agents.ego_description: moving through the seating area toward the illuminated food counter

entered.detail: green and yellow market umbrella over food preparation area

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the market, the camera passes merchandise racks and blue plastic seating. The lighting shifts as we approach a brightly lit food counter with fluorescent tubes, while colorful umbrellas shade the seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated food service counter with seated customers

events.description: slowing pace to observe the counter area and seated customers
passing glass display case with visible food items on counter

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a brightly lit food counter with fluorescent overhead lighting. Customers sit on green stools eating and drinking, while a masked vendor works behind the counter. Glass display cases and digital menu screens line the service area.

scene_state.functional_zone: food counter vendor area with digital advertisements

events.description: turning left to exit the counter area and return toward seating
returning to the open seating area with merchandise displays

agents.ego_description: moving past the vendor station and turning back toward the market seating area

notable_agents.action: customer in plaid shirt sitting at counter looking at phone

entered.detail: multiple digital screens showing animated advertisements and brand logos

segments.scene_description: Passing the vendor area with multiple digital advertisement screens showing animated content, the camera turns back toward the seating area. The merchandise racks and blue chairs come back into view as we exit the main counter area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk market, transitioning from a covered walkway into the heart of a bustling food court before circling back. It begins by moving past a central palm tree and a passing pedestrian toward a series of colorful umbrellas and food stalls. As the camera pushes deeper into the market, the environment shifts from open walkways to a more enclosed space filled with merchandise racks and blue plastic seating. The scene then opens up along a brightly lit food counter where fluorescent tubes illuminate masked vendors, digital menu screens, and customers on green stools. Finally, the camera glides past animated advertisement screens before turning back toward the blue chairs and racks as it exits the main service area.
